# This week: $500 → VTI

## Reasoning

US broad equity is the single most underweight category this week, sitting at
52.7% vs a 55% target — a ~$2,760 gap. At $500/wk this gap closes in under six
weeks. VTI lagged the total market slightly over the past month (−0.4%), so
buying it now adds at the better price. SWPPX stays frozen — it already
overlaps VTI by ~80% and holding it costs nothing, but adding to it compounds
the overlap.

$500.00 (~1.43 shares of VTI at $350.37).

- 10y Treasury yield 4.18%, roughly flat week-over-week.

- Gold (GLD) +0.6% 1w; precious_metals sleeve already overweight, so no add there.
